construct: Demonstrates understanding of fabrics, designs and constructs garments to suit market trends.

elementsOfConstruct.description: Makes informed choices and expresses innovative skills in the fashion industry

subSkills.label: Explores fashion/fabrics careers; practices work ethics; makes informed choices

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates technical knowledge and skills while promoting workplace safety

subSkills.label: Drafts pattern pieces; designs styles; sustainable needlework tools and garment construction

elementsOfConstruct.description: Develops habits and sense of responsibility in managing personal and social development

subSkills.label: Personal hygiene/health habits; grooming and cosmetology techniques

elementsOfConstruct.description: Demonstrates knowledge on the use, care and improvisation of tools and material in fashion industry for economic use of tools and materials

subSkills.label: Designs articles from local materials; utilises tools for crafts

elementsOfConstruct.description: Expresses awareness of create income generating opportunities for self-reliance and economic growth

subSkills.label: Entrepreneurial skills; manages textile enterprise; consumer rights and wise shopping

components.structureNotes: SBA Form 2-3 (30%); Final Exam Form 4 (70%). Codes 6012/1 and 6012/2.

exemplars.scenarioTheme: Pattern drafting / garment construction scenario with workplace safety
